step_rationale: Early fibrin polymerization intermediate; thrombus formation marker.
mechanism: Intermediate in fibrin polymerization indicating active coronary thrombus formation and fibrinogen consumption.

references.title: Fibrin Monomer in Thrombosis and Haemostasis: A Clinical Biomarker and Beyond.
Plasma soluble fibrin monomer complex as a marker of coronary thrombotic events in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: The Tohoku journal of experimental medicine

references.title: Plasma levels of activated protein C-protein C inhibitor complex in patients with hypercoagulable states.
